_why: Default parameters applied at model level in Open WebUI. These are the safe defaults before the profile_selector filter overrides them per-turn. Defaults are biased toward discussion quality (most common use case).

thinking.why: Nemotron Ultra performs significantly better with extended thinking enabled. The budget_tokens_default of 4096 is sufficient for most discussion turns. Architecture and research tasks use up to 16384 via profile_selector override.

nim_api_extras.why: NIM requires enable_thinking in chat_template_kwargs, not as a top-level parameter. This differs from standard OpenAI API shape.

per_profile_overrides._ref: See runtime/openwebui/config/profiles.json for per-task-class overrides applied by profile_selector.py filter at runtime.
